name: Dutch Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground meat, breadcrumbs, half of the tomato sauce, egg, salt, and pepper in a large bowl until combined.
2. Shape the mixture into a loaf.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: 1/4 of the tomato sauce, brown sugar, mustard, and vinegar until smooth.
4. Pour the prepared mixture evenly over the meat loaf.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 75 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F (71°C).
6. Turn off the oven when finished baking.
Mrs. Robert F. Lewis
